videoSnippet.title: THE TIME IS NOW! || Javokhir Sindarov vs Andrey Esipenko || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Sindarov, Javokhir (2745) - Esipenko, Andrey (2698) *
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [01] 2026.03.29
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, 4.Nf3

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Nc3 Be7 5.cxd5 exd5 6.Bf4 O-O 7.e3 c5 8.Bd3 Nc6 9.O-O c4 10.Bc2 Nh5 11.Be5 f6 12.Bg3 f5 13.Be5 Be6 14.b3 Qa5 15.Ne2 b5 16.Nf4 Nxf4 17.exf4 Qd8 18.Re1 Qd7 19.Re3 Rae8 20.h4 h6 21.g3 a6 22.Kg2 Bf7 23.Qd2 Bb4 24.Qe2 Bh5 25.a4 Ba5 26.axb5 axb5 27.Bd1 Bxf3+ 28.Qxf3 Bb6 29.Ra6 Nxd4 30.Qh5 Rxe5 31.Rxe5 Qc6 32.bxc4 bxc4 33.Ba4 Qc5 34.Qg6 Ba7 35.Re8 Rxe8 36.Qxe8+ Kh7 37.Qg6+ Kg8 38.Bd7 c3 39.Qe8+ Kh7 40.Qg6+ Kg8 41.Re6
